inclusion_rule_summary: Included in curated subset als_cns_dimn_extended because split from gse67196 table 1 cerebellar c9orf72 comparison using the public rawcount matrix.
exclusion_rule_summary: Restrict the contrast to the curated case and control arms defined in configs/subsets/als_cns_dimn_extended.yaml.
leakage_risks: Do not use downstream validation outcomes as discovery-time features.
